actionable_lessons: Trend-following edges should be judged over long out-of-sample windows, not a few attractive sessions.
A strong research culture emphasizes robustness over story-telling.
anti_patterns: This does not validate a 5-minute crypto prediction-market strategy by analogy.
Do not import broad futures results directly into Polymarket.
body:
Actionable lessons:
- Trend-following edges should be judged over long out-of-sample windows, not a few attractive sessions.
- A strong research culture emphasizes robustness over story-telling.

What it does not justify:
- This does not validate a 5-minute crypto prediction-market strategy by analogy.
- Do not import broad futures results directly into Polymarket.
citation: A Century of Evidence on Trend-Following Investing (https://www.aqr.com/Insights/Research/Journal-Article/A-Century-of-Evidence-on-Trend-Following-Investing)
summary: Practitioner research on long-run evidence for trend-following and robust research discipline.
title: A Century of Evidence on Trend-Following Investing
